name: Richard Jeni
bio: Richard Jeni was an American stand-up comedian known for high-energy, tightly constructed routines on news, sports, music, and relationships. He rose through Showtime specials and frequent Tonight Show appearances, recorded the popular HBO special Platypus Man, starred in a short-lived UPN sitcom of the same name, and appeared opposite Jim Carrey in The Mask. He died by suicide in 2007.

timeline.ev: Tonight Show debut with Johnny Carson

accolades: Comedy Central 100 Greatest Stand-Ups of All Time (No. 57)
